overall.description: A nighttime drive through a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape. The camera moves steadily along an elevated highway with neon-lit buildings visible in the distance through atmospheric haze. The scene features prominent teal and green color grading with light streaks reflecting on the road surface, characteristic of high-quality game engine rendering.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway through futuristic urban district

cluster of illuminated high-rise buildings with various neon lights visible through atmospheric haze
dark asphalt road with animated white light streaks suggesting motion or wet reflective surface
dark silhouetted industrial structures with minimal lighting along the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels steadily along an elevated highway at night through a cyberpunk city. A prominent 'softsys' neon sign glows teal on the right, while a distant futuristic skyline with scattered lights emerges through the hazy atmosphere. The road surface displays moving light streaks suggesting either wet conditions or motion blur effects, with no other vehicles or pedestrians present in the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady forward progression along an elevated highway that leads deeper into a hazy, neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape. It begins with the camera gliding over a road surface marked by shimmering light streaks, suggesting a wet texture or high-speed motion. As the vehicle advances, a prominent teal softsys neon sign glows vividly on the right, anchoring the immediate environment. The scene then opens up to reveal a distant futuristic skyline, where scattered lights gradually emerge through the atmospheric haze to define the urban horizon.
